competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

provider.name: FIFA Official API

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Corner, France. Conceded by Pau Cubarsí.
Attempt missed. Adrien Rabiot (France) left footed shot from outside the box misses to the left following a corner.

events.description: 阿德里安·拉比奥射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Dani Olmo (Spain) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Adrien Rabiot (France) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

events.description: 阿德里安·拉比奥吃到黄牌。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Álex Baena (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

events.description: 阿莱克斯·巴埃纳射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Rodri (Spain) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Corner, France. Conceded by Pau Cubarsí.
Penalty Spain. Lamine Yamal draws a foul in the penalty area.
Goal! France 0, Spain 1. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the top right corner.

events.description: 奥亚萨瓦尔破门。 比分 0-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match because of an injury William Saliba (France).
Substitution, France. Maxence Lacroix replaces William Saliba because of an injury.

events.description: 马克桑·拉克鲁瓦替补登场，换下威廉·萨利巴。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Marc Cucurella (Spain).
Marc Cucurella (Spain) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

events.description: 马克·库库雷拉吃到黄牌。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Dani Olmo (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Fabián Ruiz.

events.description: 丹尼·奥尔莫射门偏出。 法比安·鲁伊斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Spain. Álex Baena is caught offside.
Foul by Rodri (Spain).
Attempt missed. Bradley Barcola (France) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Ousmane Dembélé.

events.description: 布拉德利·巴克拉射门偏出。 登贝莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Pedro Porro (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Fabián Ruiz.

events.description: 佩德罗·波罗射门偏出。 法比安·鲁伊斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Fabián Ruiz (Spain) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Lamine Yamal.

events.description: 法比安·鲁伊斯射门被封堵。 亚马尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Spain. Conceded by Dayot Upamecano.
Foul by Lamine Yamal (Spain).
Foul by Rodri (Spain).
Offside, France. Kylian Mbappé is caught offside.
Offside, France. Kylian Mbappé is caught offside.
Corner, France. Conceded by Pau Cubarsí.
Delay in match because of an injury Aymeric Laporte (Spain).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match (Spain).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Fabián Ruiz (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Substitution, France. Manu Koné replaces Adrien Rabiot.

events.description: 马努·科内替补登场，换下阿德里安·拉比奥。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Álex Baena (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Offside, France. Adrien Rabiot is caught offside.
Foul by Álex Baena (Spain).
First Half ends, France 0, Spain 1.
Second Half begins France 0, Spain 1.
Foul by Fabián Ruiz (Spain).
Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Offside, Spain. Lamine Yamal is caught offside.
Attempt missed. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Álex Baena.

events.description: 奥亚萨瓦尔射门偏出。 阿莱克斯·巴埃纳参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Spain. Álex Baena is caught offside.
Substitution, France. Désiré Doué replaces Bradley Barcola.

events.description: 德西尔·杜埃替补登场，换下布拉德利·巴克拉。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Álex Baena (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Dani Olmo.

events.description: 阿莱克斯·巴埃纳射门被封堵。 丹尼·奥尔莫参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! France 0, Spain 2. Pedro Porro (Spain) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Dani Olmo.

events.description: 佩德罗·波罗破门。 比分 0-2。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Spain. Lamine Yamal is caught offside.
Corner, France. Conceded by Unai Simón.
Corner, France. Conceded by Pedro Porro.
Attempt missed. Aurélien Tchouaméni (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Michael Olise with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 奥雷连·楚阿梅尼射门偏出。 奥利塞参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Dani Olmo (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt blocked. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked.
Corner, France. Conceded by Marc Cucurella.
Attempt blocked. Désiré Doué (France) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Michael Olise.

events.description: 德西尔·杜埃射门被封堵。 奥利塞参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, France. Kylian Mbappé is caught offside.
Álex Baena (Spain) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, France. Théo Hernández replaces Lucas Digne.

events.description: 西奥·埃尔南德斯替补登场，换下卢卡斯·迪涅。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, France. Rayan Cherki replaces Michael Olise.

events.description: 拉扬·切尔基替补登场，换下奥利塞。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Dani Olmo (Spain).
Substitution, Spain. Ferran Torres replaces Mikel Oyarzabal.

events.description: 费兰·托雷斯替补登场，换下奥亚萨瓦尔。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Spain. Ferran Torres is caught offside.
Foul by Lamine Yamal (Spain).
Rodri (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Substitution, Spain. Mikel Merino replaces Dani Olmo.

events.description: 米克尔·梅里诺替补登场，换下丹尼·奥尔莫。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Spain. Pedri replaces Fabián Ruiz.

events.description: 佩德里替补登场，换下法比安·鲁伊斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ferran Torres (Spain) header from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the left.
Foul by Rodri (Spain).
Attempt saved. Désiré Doué (France) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Unai Simón (Spain).
VAR Decision: Other Decision Cancelled.
Substitution, Spain. Marcos Llorente replaces Pedro Porro.

events.description: 马科斯·略伦特替补登场，换下佩德罗·波罗。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Spain. Nico Williams replaces Álex Baena.

events.description: 尼科·威廉斯替补登场，换下阿莱克斯·巴埃纳。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ferran Torres (Spain).
Foul by Rodri (Spain).
Unai Simón (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Kylian Mbappé (France) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Foul by Lamine Yamal (Spain).
Attempt missed. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from outside the box is too high from a direct free kick.
Corner, France. Conceded by Marc Cucurella.
Rodri (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Nico Williams (Spain) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the left is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Ferran Torres.

events.description: 尼科·威廉斯射门偏出。 费兰·托雷斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Ousmane Dembélé (France) left footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Unai Simón (Spain). Assisted by Rayan Cherki.

events.description: 登贝莱射正。 拉扬·切尔基参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 7 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时7分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Ousmane Dembélé (France) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Unai Simón (Spain). Assisted by Désiré Doué.
Attempt missed. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Désiré Doué.

events.description: 姆巴佩射门偏出。 德西尔·杜埃参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half ends, France 0, Spain 2.

officials.name: 伊万·阿尔西德斯·巴顿·西斯内罗斯
